## The pattern
What you did. Be specific — command, file edit, agent prompt, mental model.

## Why it worked
What made this approach beat the obvious alternative. Saved time, surfaced a bug, kept context clean, etc.

## When to apply it
The trigger condition — under what circumstances should the next contributor reach for this?

## Proposed promotion
Where in the kit should this live?
- [ ] `LESSONS_LEARNED.md` (curated wisdom)
- [ ] `docs/SESSION-PLAYBOOK.md` (everyday-rituals)
- [ ] `claude-files/CLAUDE.md` (default guidance)
- [ ] Other: <suggest>

## Notes (optional)
References, links, related issues.
